---
title: "CO2xN_pH_Data_Compile"
output: pdf_document
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
---

```{r}

library(here)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(purrr)
library(data.table)
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r}

year <- "2025"

pH_path <- "GCReW_CO2xN_Porewater_"

pH_may_dat <-  read.csv(here("..", "GCREW","CO2xN", "Porewater", "pH", year, "Processed Data", paste0(pH_path, "pH_", year, "05", ".csv")))

pH_july_dat <-  read.csv(here("..", "GCREW","CO2xN", "Porewater", "pH", year, "Processed Data", paste0(pH_path, "pH_", year, "07", ".csv")))

pH_sept_dat <-  read.csv(here("..", "GCREW","CO2xN", "Porewater", "pH", year, "Processed Data", paste0(pH_path, "pH_", year, "09", ".csv")))

```

```{r}

pH_dat <- rbind(pH_july_dat[,-1], pH_may_dat[,-1], pH_sept_dat[,-1])
```

```{r}
write.csv(pH_dat, paste0("CO2xN_Porewater_pH_", year, ".csv"))

```
